title: opposite of xray
description: a mod that makes looking at diamonds(and other ore) easy but knowing if your looking at it is imposable.
body:
# what this does
it makes all stone and ores have the same texture and e f3 spacebar and w all give you intant damage. and the mod will amke you go insane when mining and diamonds coal and lapis are all the same texture as a item. This mod makes minecraft mining really really bad!!! everybstone type is cyan.... thats it and a overlay makes minecraft harder if you want to never see ore and have mining literaly anything luck this is the mod for you!!!(why would you want that though) the best part of this mod is that you could be looking anywhere underground and actualy be looking at diamonds!
